en: GameID of GameResource is invalid for file-system.
zh: 游戏资源的GameID无法用于文件系统的文件名。

UI场景实例化出错。
MotherNode: 正在执行_Ready()。
MotherNode: 正在执行InitCheck()。

en: MotherNode: Runtime builtin translations were added.
zh: MotherNode: 内置运行时翻译已加载到翻译域。
MotherNode: 启动完毕。
MotherNode: 已添加UI场景为子场景。

en: MotherNode: Unexpected to found old UIScene on placing new instance, the old one was enqueued to free.
zh: MotherNode: 超出预期地在放置新UI场景时发现旧实例，旧实例已被添加到节点释放队列。

en: MotherNode: Unhandled exception on SaveAccess async working: {0}
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess在异步工作时抛出未处理的异常: {0}

en: MotherNode: Task unsuccessfully without exception on SaveAccess async working.
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess在异步工作时Task不带异常地未成功完成。

en: MotherNode: Got unknown result from SaveAccess async working.
zh: MotherNode: 从SaveAccess异步工作接收到未知的返回结果。
MotherNode: SaveAccess返回的工作结果为WorkResult.OtherError。
MotherNode: SaveAccess解析存档失败。

en: MotherNode: SaveAccess errors on File IO.
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess在文件读写上发生错误。

en: MotherNode: SaveAccess failed to find latest save.
zh: MotherNode: SaveAccess获取最后存档失败。

en: SaveAccess: Failed to get latest save for GameID {0}.
zh: SaveAccess: 未能获取游戏ID {0} 的最后存档。

en: SaveAccess: Failed to read save file.
zh: SaveAccess: 读取存档文件失败。
SaveAccess: 存档数据解析器返回了null。

en: NumberProviderSum: An unexpected GetNumber() call has blocked by recursion lock, please check the GameResource to make sure NumberProviders aren't looping references.
zh: NumberProviderSum: 一个非预期的GetNumber()调用已被递归锁阻拦，请检查游戏资源以确保数值提供器没有发生循环引用。

en: NumberProviderSum: Catched exception on calling NumberProviders in SumList: {0}
zh: NumberProviderSum: 调用SumList中的数值提供器时捕获到异常: {0}
